frame_analyses.description: Setup view showing gauze with circular pattern marked, suspended between clamps. Two laparoscopic instruments visible - scissors on right, grasper on left
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good initial setup with clear circular pattern visible on gauze

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper securing gauze while right scissors approach the marked circle
Scissors making initial entry cut at the marked circle line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean initial incision technique, scissors perpendicular to tissue

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progresses clockwise around the circle with gauze manipulation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good coordination between grasper and scissors

frame_analyses.description: Continuing circumferential cutting with frequent gauze repositioning
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Methodical cutting technique with good tissue control

frame_analyses.description: Nearing completion of circular cut, gauze remains attached to clamps
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining gauze tension throughout cutting process

frame_analyses.description: Final cuts to complete the circular pattern, circular piece nearly separated
Task completed with circular piece cut out, gauze still secured to clamps

penalties.description: Minor deviation from marked line visible at multiple points during cutting

confidence_rationale: Completion time clearly observable, gauze remains attached throughout. Cutting precision estimated from available camera angles - some deviation measurements may be affected by viewing angle.
cannot_determine: Exact mm measurements at all cardinal points due to camera angle limitations
Precise deviation at some cutting segments where instruments obscure the view
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with smooth cutting technique and excellent time management. Total time of 78 seconds falls well within expert benchmark (60-90s).
strengths: Excellent completion time (78s vs 60-90s expert benchmark)
Maintained gauze attachment to clamps throughout
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining cutting line precision to reduce deviation penalties
Consider smaller bite sizes during cutting to improve line accuracy
